items.label: Overview
Configuration
items.content:
# Configuration

```js
new ZYNQ.Peer({
  video: true,
  audio: true,
  txt: true,
  debug: false,
  rateLimit: 30,
  maxMsgSize: 65536,
  autoReconnect: true,
  maxReconnectAttempts: 5,
  rafBatching: false,
  id: null
});
```

## Highlights

- `rateLimit` тЖТ max messages/sec
- `maxMsgSize` тЖТ prevents large payload abuse
- `autoReconnect` тЖТ keeps connection alive
- `rafBatching` тЖТ smoother event batching

items.label: Lifecycle
items.content:
# Lifecycle

## States

- `DISCONNECTED`
- `CONNECTING`
- `CONNECTED`
- `RECONNECTING`
- `FAILED`

## Flow

1. Peer initializes
2. `ready` event fires
3. Call `connect(remoteId)`
4. `open` event fires
5. Data/media exchange begins

## Example

```js
peer.on('ready', id => console.log('My ID:', id));
peer.on('open', () => console.log('Connected'));
peer.on('close', () => console.log('Disconnected'));
```

items.label: Events
items.content:
# Events

## Connection

- `ready`
- `open`
- `close`

## Data

- `data`
- `sent`

## Media

- `stream`
- `localStream`

## Errors

- `error`
- `reconnecting`

---

```js
peer.on('data', msg => console.log(msg));
peer.on('stream', stream => {
  video.srcObject = stream;
});
```

items.label: Methods
Overview
items.content:
# ZYNQ Games

ZYNQ Games is a dynamic game loader and manager.

It provides:

- ЁЯФН Smart search
- ЁЯО▓ Random selection
- тЭдя╕П Favorites system
- ЁЯУ▒ Device compatibility filtering

## Init

```js
await ZYNQ.games.init({
  mode: 'all',
  search: '',
  sort: 'name'
});
```

items.label: Device Detection
items.content:
# Device Detection

ZYNQ automatically detects device type:

## Types

- `1` тЖТ Hybrid (touch laptop)
- `2` тЖТ Desktop
- `3` тЖТ Mobile
- `4` тЖТ Tablet

Accessible via:

```js
ZYNQ.deviceType
```

Used internally for filtering supported games.

items.label: Filtering & Search
items.content:
# Filtering & Search

## Search

```js
games.search('car');
```

## Filters

```js
games.filterSupported();
games.filterFavorites();
```

## Categories

```js
games.getByCategory('arcade');
```

---

Search matches both name and alias.

items.label: Random & Shuffle
items.content:
# Random & Shuffle

## Random selection

```js
games.random(3);
```

## Single random

```js
games.getRandomOne();
```

## Shuffle list

```js
games.shuffle();
```

items.label: Sorting
items.content:
# Sorting

## By name

```js
games.sortBy('name');
```

## By popularity

```js
games.sortByPopularity();
```

items.label: Favorites & History
Game Object
items.content:
# Game Object

Each game looks like:

```js
{
  name: 'Game Name',
  alias: 'game-id',
  category: 'arcade',
  url: 'provider/game-id',
  thumb: 'cdn/provider/game-id.webp',
  devices: [1,2,3],
  isSupported: true,
  isFavorite: false
}
```
